this smoother.

just, you know, it's all.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reset the marketing strategy post-acquisition to align with new goals.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Focus marketing on the Procore ecosystem to capture immediate awareness and reduce churn risk. While Datagrid serves the broader "built world" (e.g., manufacturing), non-Procore customers are \~40% of revenue and are seen as higher churn risks (e.g., Autodesk users).](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [**Website Overhaul:** Evolve from a blog-centric site to a product-centric one. The core strategy is to connect high-traffic blogs to product pages (Agents, Connectors) and transform those pages into actionable "use case stores."](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [**"Forking" Agents:** Use the public API (`developers.datagrid.com`) to create a low-friction user experience. A website visitor will click a "Use Agent" button, triggering a login and API call to instantly create a pre-configured agent in their account, bypassing the current blank-canvas setup.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [**GrowthX Ownership:** GrowthX will own the end-to-end strategy and execution for this new website direction, leveraging past success with clients like Lovable (400-500 clicks/day from a programmatic templates library).](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot: Procore Ecosystem Focus

  - [**Rationale:** Capture immediate awareness from the Procore acquisition and reduce churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [**Audience:** Prioritize customers within the Procore ecosystem.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [**Why:** These customers have a lower churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [**Why:** Non-Procore customers (e.g., Autodesk users) are seen as higher churn risks.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [**Content:** Align content with Procore's focus (project-based construction) while maintaining the broader "built world" framing.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Explore cross-linking from Procore's top-ranking blog pages to Datagrid content.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)

### Website Overhaul: Product-Centric Experience

  - [**Goal:** Evolve the site from a blog repository to a product-centric experience that drives user action.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [**Problem:** The current site is disjointed, with high-traffic blogs failing to link to relevant product features.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [**Solution:** Transform key pages into "use case stores" that demonstrate value and enable immediate action.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
      - [**Agents Marketplace:** Connect blogs to relevant agents (e.g., an RFI blog → RFI agent page).](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [**Connectors Marketplace:** Revamp the page to be actionable, including installation guides and updated branding (remove "Toric" references).](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

### Technical Solution: "Forking" Agents via API

  - [**Goal:** Create a low-friction path from website discovery to product value.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [**Mechanism:** Use the public API (`developers.datagrid.com`) to enable instant agent creation.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Workflow:** User clicks "Use Agent" → logs in → API call instantly creates the agent in their account.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Why:** This bypasses the current blank-canvas setup, which is a high-friction experience.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [**API Capabilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
      - [**`List Agents`:** Retrieves an agent's full configuration (instructions, tools, knowledge).](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
      - [**`Create Agent`:** Uses the retrieved configuration to create a new agent.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
      - [**`Create Knowledge`:** Can be augmented to copy a knowledge base to a new workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
      - [**Streaming:** The API supports streaming responses, enabling live, interactive demos on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)

### Partnership Logistics

  - [**GrowthX Point of Contact:** Liz Kushnereit is now the primary contact, taking over from Vivek Shankar.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**Smartlead Subscription:** GrowthX is billed for a Smartlead subscription under Thiago's name. Kaitlin will confirm if it is still in use.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kaitlin:** Confirm if the Smartlead subscription is still needed.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Develop a strategic proposal for the website overhaul, including priorities and resource allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Schedule a 1-hour follow-up next week to review the proposal with Thiago.](https://fathom.video/share/jDdzjmmXd6vx8o-pDdasq_Y5i6wzN63B?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

action_items.description: Confirm Smartlead usage w/ Thiago; then notify Vivek to cancel if unused
Schedule site access w/ Thiago/Kaitlin; then connect Nico and start audit
Schedule 1-hr review w/ Thiago next week re: plan/allocation
